2.code:
Website Rebuild Intake

Paul - this is the intake we need to build the new NextStepBath.com to the Growth Package standard and start earning rankings in Columbus, Grove City, Pataskala, Galloway, and Plain City.

The more specific and honest your answers, the better the site will perform. Generic answers produce generic pages, and Google ignores those.

Time required: About 30-45 minutes if you have your license, insurance, and review numbers handy. If a question doesn't apply, write "N/A" or pick the closest option - don't skip it.

4.label: Full legal name (and any nickname you go by professionally)

5.label: Year you started in the trades
5.description: Any trade, not just this business.

6.label: Year you founded NextStep Bath Solutions

7.label: Your story - in your own words, why did you start NextStep Bath Solutions?
7.description: Was there a personal moment? A family member? A gap in the market you saw? This is the single most important answer in the whole form. AI engines and real homeowners both reward authenticity here.

8.label: What's different about how you do this work compared to the big national franchises (Bath Fitter, Re-Bath, etc.)?

9.label: LinkedIn profile URL
9.description: The one Mike found you on. We'll pull what we can from it.

10.label: Do you have a longer bio written anywhere we can use as a starting point?

1.label: Yes - on my LinkedIn About section (and it's more than the headline)

2.label: Yes - somewhere else (please tell us where below)

3.label: No - but I can write 200-400 words about my background if you give me a prompt

4.label: No - and I'd rather you interview me by phone and write it for me

11.label: If somewhere else - paste the URL or describe where to find it

conditionals.value: Yes - somewhere else (please tell us where below)

12.label: Personal website, blog, podcast appearance, or news article you've been featured in?

13.label: Headshot photo - do you have a professional or semi-professional one we can use?

1.label: Yes - I'll send a high-resolution file

2.label: No - but I can take one this week (phone photo against a plain wall is fine)

3.label: I'd rather you send a photographer or just use stock

15.label: Are you a Certified Aging-in-Place Specialist (CAPS)?
15.description: The CAPS designation is from the National Association of Home Builders.

16.label: Year certified and certificate number (if you have it)

17.label: List any other certifications, manufacturer authorizations, or professional memberships you hold
17.description: Examples: NAHB, NARI, NKBA, BBB Accredited Business, CleanCut Authorized Installer, Bestbath Dealer, Safe Step Authorized, Independent Living Specialist. Include year of each.

18.label: Ohio contractor license number (and license type)
18.description: If Ohio doesn't require a state-level license for your specific work, list any city/county registrations.

19.label: General liability insurance carrier and policy limit

20.label: Workers' comp policy or exempt status

21.label: Bonded? If yes, amount and surety company

23.label: Discount programs you offer (or want to offer) - check all that apply

3.label: First responder discount (police, fire, EMS, dispatch)

8.label: Referral discount (existing customer refers a new one)

9.label: None currently - but I'd consider adding one

10.label: None - and I don't want to offer discounts

23.description: Each one we list on the site is a trust signal AND a search-volume capture: people search for things like 'walk-in tub veterans discount Columbus' as distinct queries.

24.label: For each one you checked, what's the discount amount or percentage?

conditionals.value: First responder discount (police, fire, EMS, dispatch)
Referral discount (existing customer refers a new one)

25.label: Are you yourself a veteran?
25.description: If yes we can add a veteran-owned business badge - a real ranking factor for veterans searching for accessibility contractors.

26.label: Branch and years of service (only as much as you want to share publicly)

1.label: I have a public commercial address customers can visit

2.label: I have a home office I'd rather not list publicly

3.label: Service-area-only - I'd like the GBP set up without a street address

29.label: Full street address, suite, city, state, ZIP

conditionals.value: I have a public commercial address customers can visit

30.label: Primary business phone (will be displayed on every page)

31.label: Primary business email
31.description: This is the email used for confirmation copies - make sure it's correct.

32.label: Business hours
32.description: Default is Mon-Fri 8AM-5PM - change if different.

33.label: Google Business Profile - Mike already has access and is updating it. Anything specific you want to make sure ends up there, or anything currently there you want changed/removed?

34.label: Roughly how many Google reviews do you have right now?

35.label: Are you on any of these other review platforms? Mark which and how many reviews on each.
35.description: Angi, BBB, Houzz, HomeAdvisor, Yelp, Facebook, GuildQuality, Nextdoor, AARP, Eldercare Locator, etc.

36.label: Do you use any field service / booking software?

5.label: Nothing - phone, email, and a notebook

36.description: The Growth Package includes booking-widget integration if you use one.

38.code: Facebook Page Management - Mike is including Facebook page setup and ongoing posting at no additional charge as part of your package. The next four questions get us what we need to do that.

39.label: Facebook Business Page URL
39.description: Paste the URL or write 'don't have one' if there isn't a page yet.

1.label: I'll add Mike (mike@korekomfortsolutions.com) as a Page admin via Meta Business Suite

2.label: I'll send Mike my login credentials (less preferred - we'd rather use proper admin access)

3.label: I don't know how to grant access - I'll need help walking through it

4.label: There's no page yet - Mike should create one from scratch

41.label: How active do you want NextStep's Facebook to be?

1.label: Frequent - 3+ posts per week, project photos, tips, community engagement

2.label: Steady - 1-2 posts per week, mostly project photos and customer wins

3.label: Light - 2-4 posts per month, just enough to look alive

4.label: I trust your judgment - pick a cadence that fits the goal

42.label: Anything off-limits on Facebook?
42.description: Topics, opinions, photos, or content styles you do NOT want associated with NextStep Bath Solutions. Politics, religion, specific competitors, certain product brands, anything personal - call it out now so we don't post something you'd want pulled later.

44.label: Services you currently offer (check all that apply)

3.label: Step-in tub conversions (CleanCut or similar inserts)

4.label: Full walk-in tub installations (replacement tubs, not inserts)

7.label: Bidet seat or full bidet installation

12.label: Bathroom lighting upgrades for low-vision homeowners

44.description: The current site shows three. We need to know if that's the full menu or if we're leaving money on the table.

46.label: Which service brings you the most revenue per job?

47.label: Which service has the best lead-to-close ratio?

48.label: Which service do you most want to grow over the next 12 months?

49.label: Do you offer free in-home consultations?

50.label: Any conditions or restrictions on free consultations?

2.label: Third-party financing partner - name them below

conditionals.value: Third-party financing partner - name them below

53.label: Typical price ranges you're comfortable publishing on the site
53.description: Most homeowners want a range. Examples: 'Tub-to-shower conversion: $X,XXX to $X,XXX', 'Grab bar installation: $XXX per bar, $XXX for full bathroom'. If you'd rather not publish prices, write 'NO PRICES'.

54.label: Warranty terms - labor warranty and product warranty separately

57.label: Have you completed work in Columbus in the last 24 months?

3.label: No, but I'd take work there

4.label: No - and not currently set up to

58.label: Roughly how many jobs in Columbus in the last 24 months?

59.label: Notable senior communities, 55+ neighborhoods, or care facilities in Columbus you've worked in or near

60.label: Local landmarks or neighborhoods a Columbus resident would recognize
60.description: Town Center, parks, main streets, school districts, churches.

61.label: Your main competitors actually doing this work in Columbus

63.label: Have you completed work in Grove City in the last 24 months?

3.label: No, but I'd take work there

4.label: No - and not currently set up to

64.label: Roughly how many jobs in Grove City in the last 24 months?

65.label: Notable senior communities, 55+ neighborhoods, or care facilities in Grove City you've worked in or near

66.label: Local landmarks or neighborhoods a Grove City resident would recognize
66.description: Town Center, parks, main streets, school districts, churches.

67.label: Your main competitors actually doing this work in Grove City

69.label: Have you completed work in Pataskala in the last 24 months?

3.label: No, but I'd take work there

4.label: No - and not currently set up to

70.label: Roughly how many jobs in Pataskala in the last 24 months?

71.label: Notable senior communities, 55+ neighborhoods, or care facilities in Pataskala you've worked in or near

72.label: Local landmarks or neighborhoods a Pataskala resident would recognize
72.description: Town Center, parks, main streets, school districts, churches.

73.label: Your main competitors actually doing this work in Pataskala

75.label: Have you completed work in Galloway in the last 24 months?

3.label: No, but I'd take work there

4.label: No - and not currently set up to

76.label: Roughly how many jobs in Galloway in the last 24 months?

77.label: Notable senior communities, 55+ neighborhoods, or care facilities in Galloway you've worked in or near

78.label: Local landmarks or neighborhoods a Galloway resident would recognize
78.description: Town Center, parks, main streets, school districts, churches.

79.label: Your main competitors actually doing this work in Galloway

81.label: Have you completed work in Plain City in the last 24 months?

3.label: No, but I'd take work there

4.label: No - and not currently set up to

82.label: Roughly how many jobs in Plain City in the last 24 months?

83.label: Notable senior communities, 55+ neighborhoods, or care facilities in Plain City you've worked in or near

84.label: Local landmarks or neighborhoods a Plain City resident would recognize
84.description: Town Center, parks, main streets, school districts, churches.

85.label: Your main competitors actually doing this work in Plain City

1.label: I have 50+ photos with signed releases - ready to send

2.label: I have 10-50 photos but no formal releases - homeowners would probably consent

3.label: I have a handful of phone photos

4.label: I have nothing usable - we'll need to plan a photo session

88.label: Customer testimonials / reviews you can quote on the site

1.label: Yes - I have 10+ written testimonials with the customer's first name and city

2.label: Yes - I have several Google reviews we can use

4.label: None I can put my hands on right now

89.label: Logo files you have access to

1.label: Vector files (.ai, .eps, .svg, or layered .pdf) - the originals

3.label: Just whatever's on the current website

4.label: I'm not sure - I'll check with whoever made it

90.label: Social media accounts other than Facebook (which we covered above)
90.description: Instagram handle, TikTok, YouTube, Nextdoor, LinkedIn company page. Note which you actually update vs. which exist but are dormant.

91.label: Roughly how many qualified leads are you getting per month right now?

92.label: What's your average completed job value?

93.label: Realistic 90-day goal - leads per month you'd like to be getting

95.label: If you could outrank ONE competitor in Google search results in Columbus, who is it and why?
95.description: This tells us who to study and where to find rankable gaps.

96.label: Anything else you want me to know?
96.description: Pet peeves about your old marketing, things you absolutely don't want on the new site, words/phrases you do or don't want associated with NextStep, ideal customer descriptions, etc.

settings.form_title: NextStep Bath Solutions - Website Rebuild Intake

1.name: Default Confirmation
1.message:
Thanks Paul - your intake came through.

I have everything I need to start the rebuild. A copy of your answers has been emailed to you for your records.

Watch for an email from me within 5 business days with the rebuilt About page, schema and trust-signal upgrades to your service pages, and a draft of the Columbus city page for your approval.

- Mike
